title: The Life After
overview: Set in Algeria, a widow whose husband was killed in a terrorist attack and her only son have to move from one village to another to escape false rumors and harassment. When they finally settle in a place and find work, their lives will take another drastic turn. Will it be for the worse or the better?

trailers.title: Bande annonce "La Vie d'après" premier long métrage d'Anis Djaad. Alegria Production (2021).
